devdoc.details: Registry for workers participating in the payroll system Handles worker registration, KYC verification, and salary management

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

assignEmployer(address,address,uint256).details: Assign worker to an employer (called by employer or system)

changeWorkerStatus(address,uint8).details: Change worker status (only owner or KYC verifier)

getTotalWorkers().details: Get total number of registered workers

isVerifiedWorker(address).details: Check if a worker is verified (active status)

isWorker(address).details: Check if an address is a registered worker

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

updateTotalEarned(address,uint256).details: Update total earned amount for a worker (called by PayrollContract)

params._workerAddress: Address of the worker to verify

devdoc.title: WorkerRegistry
